evidence_refs.source_quote: A map of the SBS Corridor in Queens, New York. The route is highlighted with a dashed blue line, starting from Woodside (near LIRR) and ending at Rockaway Beach.
Study local, limited, and express bus services

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id route_q52-sbs-queens (record lists submission sub_db0b947ae691c141 and alias route_q52-sbs-woodhaven-workshop2). No different registry record represents the same Q52 SBS route — route_q52-ltd-woodhaven-2014 is a distinct LTD variant. Self-resolution is new.
